description:
Elder Scrolls Online is a MMORPG Set in the world of The elder Scrolls. Journey across the reagons of Tamriel while fighting
against various enemys

0.1.0.description:
# The First Release
### What's Included
Locations:
Main Quest Completion
Zone Quest Completion
Discovering Wayshrines

Items:
Zone Access
Progressive Main Quest

This release has a few major design issues, as such, I will be trying to get a 0.2.0 out ASAP. More Details on what is wrong and what my plans are to fix them can be found in the Discord thread

If you encounter any issues, check the FAQ and if that doesn't solve your issue ping Spencer2585 in the thread
0.1.0.title: APESO 0.1.0

0.2.0.description:
## Changes
- Added a new victory condition: final zone quest. This puts Victory behind completing the final quest in a chosen zone's story
- Added new options for the final zone quest goal
- Added new option: zone count. This allows you to limit the zones you have to do in a seed, shortening the average seed time. Zones are randomly chosen from a user-configured list
- Added support for lenux/mac computers
0.2.0.title: APESO 0.2.0

0.2.1.description:
## Changes
- Changed how the client finds the mods directory so that changes are saved across instances of the client
- Updated Client so that the tab name says ESO Client
- Client will now warn the user if the mods folder is not found when opening
- Fixed zone warning system to start teleportation to starting zone if entering a restricted zone
- Fixed zone warning system to warn user about client connection if their starting region is locked

This Update is compatible with games generated on 0.2.0
0.2.1.title: APESO 0.2.1

0.2.2.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed issue with items being removed

This update is compatible with games generated on 0.2.1 and 0.2.0
only the apworld is changed from 0.2.1 so if you are updating you do not need the new mod
0.2.2.title: APESO 0.2.2

0.3.0.description:
As this is a prerelease, **there may be several bugs that could take from the experience or result in the creation of an unbeatable seed**, This release should only be used for those who want to test out the new features or want to help find bugs ~~or those who dont care and just want to play anyways~~

Honestly, I think I found most of the bugs. Any remaining unknown bugs are likely located in the client or mod, which means that a hotfix should be able to fix them without the need to generate a new game. That being said, I cannot guarantee this is the case, so don't say I didn't warn you.

## Whats New
- Completely redone Mod and APWorld code
- Added Delve access items and completion locations
- New Goal: Dungeon Delver, complete every delve included in your seed
- changed the wayshrine checks to activate when interacting with the wayshrine, not just first discovery. This is for those who want to use an existing character for the AP run
- Added new system to prevent players from interacting with interactables that lead to locked zones
- Added new system to block traveling to other zones via dialogue with an NPC
- Added new system to limit how much gold the player can have on them
- New Options
  - Delves_per_region: How many delves to include from each zone, goes up to 18, set to 0 to disable zone locations and locking
  - Enable Main Quests: to enable and disable locations for the main quest, must be enabled for the main quest goal or if coldharbour is your goal for zone quest goal
  - enable Wayshine checks: to enable and disable checks for interacting with wayshrines
  - base gold cap: what you want the gold cap to be without any wallet increase items, set to 0 to enable gold limiting
- More that I can't remember off the top of my head

## Known Bugs:
- Leaving the client on for an extended period of time can result in the client wiping all items sent to the mod, meaning the game may tell you that you don't have something you should have. If this occurs, you should just be able to close and reopen the client, and upon reconnection, it should fix all items sent to the game. Ill be looking into what causes this but its likely a 0.4.0+ issue to fix for when I rewrite the client like I did with the apworld and mod in this one
- Setting your goal region to random can cause it to pick a region inaccessible with a low zone count, causing generation errors. This error occurs at the beginning of generation, so you should know if there's a problem pretty quick. You can avoid this by manually choosing a goal zone or trying to regen so it picks a different zone until you get it to work. Note that the lower you set the zone count, the more likely this is to occur. I will be looking into fixing this before 0.3.0 proper.
- Controller can break on reloads, Ill be looking into this fairly soon. Can be worked around by reloadUI until controller works
0.3.0.title: APESO 0.3.0 Pre-Release 1

0.3.0_PR2.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed bug where mod would check access based on Glenumbra instead of the current zone, leading to zones that are never locked giving a locked zone warning
0.3.0_PR2.title: APESO 0.3.0 Pre-Release 2

0.3.0_PR5.title: APESO 0.3.0 Pre-Release 5

0.3.0_PR6.description:
This release aims to provide a few features to make the play experience simpler and more streamlined
## Whats new

- New APESO menu which can currently only be toggled by running the command /showapmenu. The AP menu currently only consists of an options page but future UI features and options will be placed inside this menu.
  - Added toggle in Options Menu for debug mode
  - added toggle in Options menu for auto running reloadUI when a location is checked

- The mod will now automatically run reloadUI when you check a location. This will not happen if you are in combat. If that happens text will appear in chat telling you it could not run reloadUI and you will have to manually run it. If you get an item sent to you that you want immediately, you will still have to run reloadUI manually. If you do not want this feature enabled you can disable it in the previously mentioned AP menu.

## Misc
- Updated API Version to 101049
- Changed  /eso_goal client command to /eso_info to better reflect its function
0.3.0_PR6.title: APESO 0.3.0 Pre-Release 6

0.3.0_PR7.description:
This update has no updates to APWorld code. if you are running the apworld from PR6 then you do not need to update
This update is compatible with games generated on previous PR versions
## Whats new
- Added warning if character alliance does not match the alliance selected at generation

## Bug Fixes
- fixed placement of close button on AP Menu
- Fixed bug with the zone warning popup code
0.3.0_PR7.title: APESO 0.3.0 Pre-Release 7
